# shopify_collection (Resource)

Manages a Shopify collection (manual or smart).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manual collection
resource "shopify_collection" "featured" {
  title            = "Featured Products"
  handle           = "featured"
  description_html = "<p>Our handpicked featured products.</p>"
  sort_order       = "MANUAL"
}

# Smart collection with rules
resource "shopify_collection" "sale" {
  title            = "Sale Items"
  handle           = "sale"
  description_html = "<p>Products currently on sale.</p>"
  sort_order       = "PRICE_ASC"

  rule_set = {
    applied_disjunctively = false
    rules = [
      {
        column    = "IS_PRICE_REDUCED"
        relation  = "IS_SET"
        condition = "true"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) Collection title.

### Optional

- `description_html` (String) Collection description in HTML.
- `handle` (String) URL-friendly collection handle. Auto-generated from title if not set.
- `rule_set` (Attributes) Rules for automatic (smart) collections. Omit for manual collections. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rule_set))
- `sort_order` (String) Product sort order: ALPHA_ASC, ALPHA_DESC, BEST_SELLING, CREATED, CREATED_DESC, MANUAL, PRICE_ASC, PRICE_DESC.
- `template_suffix` (String) Liquid template suffix for the collection page.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Shopify collection GID.

<a id="nestedatt--rule_set"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rule_set`

Required:

- `applied_disjunctively` (Boolean) Whether products must match any rule (true) or all rules (false).
- `rules` (Attributes List) Collection rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rule_set--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--rule_set--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rule_set.rules`

Required:

- `column` (String) Rule column: TAG, TITLE, TYPE, VENDOR, VARIANT_PRICE, IS_PRICE_REDUCED, VARIANT_COMPARE_AT_PRICE, VARIANT_WEIGHT, VARIANT_INVENTORY, VARIANT_TITLE.
- `condition` (String) Rule condition value.
- `relation` (String) Rule relation: EQUALS, NOT_EQUALS, CONTAINS, NOT_CONTAINS, STARTS_WITH, ENDS_WITH, GREATER_THAN, LESS_THAN, IS_SET, IS_NOT_SET.
